# PHIL.055 ? Dualism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** modern_western
**Subcategory:** dualism
**Domain:** MODERN_WESTERN
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Mind and body as distinct substances; interaction problem; res cogitans and res extensa; irreducible mental properties

## Application
Recognize mind-body distinction; mental causation; non-reducible consciousness; substance dualism or property dualism

## Key Values
- Mind-body distinction
- Mental irreducibility
- Dual substances
- Consciousness primacy

## Tags
philosophy, modern-western, dualism
